summary: McKenzie shares a quick marketing tip about adding a free icon set to his Irish bingo cards blog post to increase click-through rates. He argues that visual elements make content more linkable and clickable, especially when the content is already useful and timely. The post is a brief observation timed around St. Patrick's Day seasonal traffic.
key_points: Adding images to content increases click-through rates and linkability
Free icon sets can be leveraged to spruce up seasonal marketing content
Visual content grips readers more effectively than text alone
Timing content to seasonal events (St. Patrick's Day) drives thousands of views
money_quotes: Add a cool looking image to useful content and you'll get much better linkable action out of it.
Folks are much more likely to click it.
key_insight: Adding relevant images to useful content significantly increases engagement and link-building potential, especially for seasonal marketing.
